title: Sprint Capacity Planner settings
description: App-level settings. Per-project configuration (board, effort fields, participants) lives in the project's Sprint Capacity tab.

reminderLeadDays.title: Availability reminder lead days
reminderLeadDays.description: Remind participants who have not confirmed their availability this many days before a Sprint starts. Informational only; never blocks planning. Defaults to 3 when unset.
